title: Ceraia pseudoequitans
taxonomy: Ceraia pseudoequitans is a species of moth in the family Sphingidae. The classification of Ceraia pseudoequitans places it within the genus Ceraia. Ceraia pseudoequitans is a member of the order Lepidoptera. Further classification of this species includes it being within the family Sphingidae and the subfamily Sphinginae. This classification highlights the species' position within the larger taxonomic hierarchy of moths.
